name: Ayesha Khan
title: Back pain is noticeably better
review: We upgraded to the Duropedic Airboost after years on a basic foam mattress. The support is firm but not hard — I wake up without the lower-back ache I used to get. Delivery was smooth and the mattress looked exactly like the photos.

name: Priya Sharma
title: Stays cool through the night
review: The Arctic Ice cover and Airboost layers really do feel more breathable. Mumbai summers used to mean sticky nights; this mattress is the first one where I am not flipping sides looking for a cool spot. Worth the price for the sleep quality.

name: Neha Verma
title: Great edge support for a foam mattress
review: I was worried about sinking at the edges — we read a lot of reviews before buying Duroflex. Sitting on the side of the bed to tie shoes feels stable, and the middle stays even when two people sleep. Minor off-gassing smell for a day, then fine.

name: Riya Patel
title: Motion isolation is excellent
review: My partner tosses a lot; I barely feel it on this mattress. The motion isolation is a huge upgrade from our old spring bed. Fabric quality looks premium and the stitching is neat all around.

name: Kavita Reddy
title: Firmness was perfect after a short break-in
review: First week it felt a touch firmer than the store sample, but it settled into a balanced feel. Customer care answered our questions about rotation and care. Happy with Duroflex overall.

name: Simran Kaur
title: Investment that paid off for our parents
review: We bought this for my parents who preferred orthopedic-style support. They say sleep is deeper and getting up in the morning is easier. The brand warranty details were clear in the box.

name: Meera Joshi
title: Consistent quality from Duroflex World
review: This is our second Duroflex mattress in the house. The Airboost 6.8 has that signature balanced feel — not too soft, not board-hard. Packaging was solid and the unpack video on their site helped.

name: Ananya Desai
title: Trusted Indian sleep brand
review: We compared a few imports and chose Duroflex for service network and spare parts story. The mattress feels well engineered and the cover is easy to spot-clean.

name: Shruti Iyer
title: Strong value at this price
review: You get features you would expect from pricier imports — breathable layers, good support zone mapping in practice, and a reassuring warranty. Delivery crew was polite and on time.

name: Pooja Hegde
title: Fast delivery, neat packaging
review: Ordered during a sale and it still arrived within the promised window. Box had clear labels and the mattress inflated evenly after unroll. Happy with Duroflex World shopping experience.

name: Tanya Bhatia
title: Support where you need it
review: I sleep mostly on my side and my husband on his back — we both feel supported. Duropedic zoning is subtle but real. No more morning shoulder numbness for me.

name: Sakshi Nair
title: Allergen-conscious household approved
review: The anti-microbial fabric was a selling point for our family. Sheets fit well and the mattress height works with our existing bed frame without modifications.

name: Divya Agarwal
title: Good for guest room too
review: We started with one mattress for the master and liked it enough to order another for the guest room. Guests have commented on comfort without us asking.

name: Aditi Rao
title: Our go-to recommendation now
review: Whenever friends ask about mattresses we point them to Duroflex World. Transparent specs, honest firmness scale, and products that match the description.

name: Geeta Singh
title: Noticeable difference in sleep depth
review: I track sleep with a wearable and deep sleep minutes went up the second week on this bed. Could be coincidence but subjectively I feel more rested.

name: Roshni M.
review: Love our new Duroflex — sleeping so much better.

name: Smriti K.
review: Airboost feels cool and supportive. Great purchase!

name: Jhanvi T.
review: Finally a mattress that does not trap heat.

name: Alia S.
review: Duroflex delivery was quick and professional.

name: Deepa R.
review: Orthopedic support without feeling like a rock.

name: Nikita P.
review: Fabric looks premium in person.

name: Vandana F.
review: Best mattress upgrade we have made in years!

name: Sanjana W.
review: Barely feel partner movement at night.

name: Ishita B.
review: Recommended Duroflex to my sister already.

name: Mansi C.
review: Solid edge support — happy with that.

name: Pallavi G.
review: Worth it for the 10-year peace of mind.

name: Kirti D.
review: Unboxed easily, expanded evenly in hours.

name: Richa V.
review: Duropedic line lives up to the name.

name: Farah A.
review: No morning stiffness — huge relief.

name: Natasha K.
review: Duroflex World experience was smooth end-to-end.
